name: Kore.ai
description: Kore.ai — Enterprise conversational AI platform for building virtual assistants with no-code dialog management.

seo.title: Kore.ai — AI API / SDK for Developers
seo.meta_description: Kore.ai: Kore.ai — Enterprise conversational AI platform for building virtual assistants with no-code dialog management.

when_to_use: Building enterprise virtual assistants without deep ML expertise
Deploying multi-channel AI bots across web, mobile, and voice
Automating HR, IT, and finance workflows with AI agents
Orchestrating multi-bot environments with bot orchestration layer

pros: Strong no-code dialog and analytics tooling
Contact center and HR deployments at scale
cons: Heavy platform compared to modern LLM agents
Expensive, long sales and implementation cycles
UX feels dated next to new LLM builders
review.verdict: Safe enterprise bet for regulated VA deployments, overkill for most modern AI chat projects.
review.best_for: Large enterprises replacing legacy IVR or chatbot systems with governance
review.not_for: Startups preferring LLM-first stacks like Vapi, Retell or custom builds
